disruptors.notes: ~300 days to kill a corvette; armor/shield hardening kills bypass

autocannon_plasma.notes: ~23 days to kill a corvette; best for corvette/destroyer swarms

titan_perdition.notes: 500 dmg, 40 range, AoE; punishes small fleet spam

crystal_hull_plating.notes: Flat damage reduction strong on tanky ships

torpedoes.notes: Damage bonus reduced to 20% of former values

shield_capacitors.notes: Massively buffed; always consider shield-heavy builds

early.notes: Fill 50 naval cap. Corvettes with autocannon+plasma. Add destroyers for PD.

mid.notes: Cruisers with kinetic artillery + neutron launchers. Keep corvette screen.

late.notes: Titan + battleship artillery core. Split fleets to avoid enemy titan AoE.

early.notes: Minerals are the foundation. Energy can be balanced later. Never stop building.

mid.notes: Transition to district specializations. Automation buildings now job-specific.

late.notes: Repeatables give +20 naval cap per tech. Dyson Sphere + Matter Decompressor essential.

combat_rules.ship_tankiness: much higher than pre-4.3; battles last longer
combat_rules.split_fleets: Always split to avoid titan AoE concentration
combat_rules.starbases_unreliable: Don't depend on starbases for defense

crisis_counters.prethoryn: Balanced loadout; they have mixed defenses

ascension_meta.psionic: THE meta — unity generation, covenant power spikes, mid-game alloy spikes
ascension_meta.virtual: Void Dwellers + unity stacking → extremely strong post-ascension tech explosion
ascension_meta.cybernetic: Double-dip organic + cybernetic traits; Creed provides strongest worker buff
ascension_meta.synthetic: Under One Rule → late-game snowball; Luminary ruler unique synth trait

key_changes_from_previous: Job research output halved, tech costs halved
Unity sources reduced; base empire unity = 10
Many job output modifiers → job efficiency modifiers
All ship naval cap usage ~5x higher
Corvee System no longer best worker civic (ethic changes)
Authoritarian: worker bonus → worker job efficiency
Corporate authority: +1 envoy instead of +1 external leader pool
meta_rules_domestic: 4.3.4 META: Job EFFICIENCY > raw output. Specialize planets (forge/research/factory). Minerals = foundation early. Trade builds top-tier. Unity rush + ascension = strongest macro. COLONIZE aggressively. FOCUS_TECH when behind. Stability bonuses halved.
meta_rules_military: 4.3.4 META: Disruptors DEAD. Autocannon+Plasma = swarm meta. Titan AoE = meta-defining, split fleets. Naval cap 5x (corvette=5, BB=40). BUILD_STARBASE at chokepoints. DIPLOMACY for federations. ESPIONAGE for intel. PREPARE_WAR vs hostile neighbors.
